news-global-econ.title: Retired general calls for US ground operation to seize Iranian island, cut off regime's 'economic lifeline'
news-global-econ.description: Retired Lt. Gen. Keith Kellogg said seizing Iran’s Kharg Island and securing the Strait of Hormuz with U.S. ground forces could break Tehran’s control over global oil flows.

news-global-econ.title: Democrat strategist warns Mamdani's ballooning NYC budget plan gives Republicans a ready-made midterm message
news-global-econ.description: Democratic strategist Melissa DeRosa says NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani's $127B budget hands Republicans a perfect midterm attack on tax-and-spend Democrats.

news-global-econ.title: Greater weight loss promised by higher-dose Wegovy shot, now approved by FDA
news-global-econ.description: The FDA approved Wegovy HD, a higher-dose semaglutide for weight loss in adults with obesity, offering greater weight reduction, as experts warn of side effects.

news-global-econ.title: Minnesota millionaire who qualified for food stamps warns of 'fraud by design' loophole ahead of hearing
news-global-econ.description: A millionaire says he qualified for food stamps via a SNAP loophole and will testify at a Minnesota state hearing pushing for stricter asset test reforms.

news-global-econ.title: Gov Josh Shapiro admits Dem issues beyond rhetoric, says they failed to deliver to voters
news-global-econ.description: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro argues the Democratic Party's problems go beyond messaging, saying Democrats failed to deliver tangible results and need an internal reckoning.

news-global-soc.title: American officials issue 'worldwide caution' advisory for travelers amid global conflict
news-global-soc.description: The State Department issued a "worldwide caution" alert warning Americans abroad about Iran-linked threats, urging heightened caution in the Middle East.

news-global-soc.title: Retired general calls for US ground operation to seize Iranian island, cut off regime's 'economic lifeline'
news-global-soc.description: Retired Lt. Gen. Keith Kellogg said seizing Iran’s Kharg Island and securing the Strait of Hormuz with U.S. ground forces could break Tehran’s control over global oil flows.

news-global-soc.title: Iran Has Laid Small Number of Naval Mines Into Strait of Hormuz, Challenging Peace Talks: Report
news-global-soc.description:
Iran has laid a small number of sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz, an anonymously-sourced report claims.
The post Iran Has Laid Small Number of Naval Mines Into Strait of Hormuz, Challenging Peace Talks: Report appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.title: Zelensky: Russia Offering Iran Intelligence Support to Strike Enemies 'More Accurately'
news-global-soc.description:
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky warned in a war update on Monday that the government of Russia was allegedly offering Iran intelligence to help it more accurately target sites, presumably American or Israeli targets, in the ongoing war in the region.

news-global-soc.title: Trump unveils national AI policy framework
news-global-soc.description: The Trump administration released a national AI framework addressing safety, jobs, energy use and free speech as the U.S. seeks to stay competitive globally.
